## Type of change

## Verification

<!-- How did you test this? Tick what you ran. -->

- [ ] `pnpm run build`
- [ ] `pnpm run lint`
- [ ] `pnpm run test`
- [ ] `pnpm run check:rust`
- [ ] `pnpm run test:rust`
- [ ] Ran the app locally and inspected the change

## Checklist

- [ ] The change respects the package boundary rules in `AGENTS.md`.
- [ ] No secrets are stored as plaintext; sensitive data stays redacted.
- [ ] User-visible copy uses the shared i18n keys.
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included.
